reviews.author: Brad Goldberg
reviews.text: Amazing attention to details and pride in their work!!! Kept me updated throughout the process.. My car was a tragic mess inside and he far exceeded my expectations!!!!! Highly highly recommend!!! Support local business!!!!

reviews.author: Pat soderquist
reviews.text: What an absolute amazing job . Logan made my 9 years old car look brand new . Would truly recommend him to do your detailing .

reviews.author: Lily H
reviews.text: Shout out to Logan! He did an incredible job detailing our car. He is a lifesaver!!!  Check out Sumptuous Mobile Detailing if you need a mobile car detailing service or same day detailing!!

reviews.author: Mike D
reviews.text: Darren was very professional and very reasonable with his prices.  I did a 3 year ceramic coat and it looks amazing.  I will definitely be in touch in the future

reviews.author: Adele Garza
reviews.text: Logan was amazing and easy to schedule with. He answered all of my questions to my satisfaction and wasn’t pushy at all. Though we sold our vehicle before we could detail it, if I’m ever in need for a detail on my 2024 Blazer I will use him for certain! He’s very reasonable and responsive! Thank you Logan. We will be in touch again soon! ☺️
